---
title: "Clean Weather (with Discomfort Index)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("data.table")
}
if (!requireNamespace("readxl", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("readxl")
}
library(data.table)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
# Paths
input_path <- "Datasets/weather.xls"
output_path <- "Datasets/Clean/Weather_Clean_Daily.csv"

# Date filter window aligned to complaints data
min_date <- as.IDate("2006-01-01")
max_date <- as.IDate("2024-12-31")

# Try readxl first; if it fails, fall back to Excel COM via PowerShell
read_weather <- function(path) {
  dt <- NULL
  dt <- tryCatch({
    raw <- read_excel(path, col_names = FALSE)
    as.data.table(raw)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)

  if (is.null(dt)) {
    # Fallback: export to CSV using Excel COM and read with fread
    csv_tmp <- file.path(tempdir(), "weather_tmp.csv")
    src <- normalizePath(path, winslash = "\\", mustWork = TRUE)
    dst <- normalizePath(csv_tmp, winslash = "\\", mustWork = FALSE)
    ps <- sprintf(
      "$excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; " %+%
        "$excel.Visible = $false; " %+%
        "$wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open('%s'); " %+%
        "$wb.SaveAs('%s', 6); " %+%
        "$wb.Close($false); " %+%
        "$excel.Quit();",
      src,
      dst
    )
    system2("powershell", args = c("-NoProfile", "-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass", "-Command", ps))
    dt <- fread(csv_tmp, header = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
  }
  dt
}

`%+%` <- function(a, b) paste0(a, b)

raw_dt <- read_weather(input_path)

# Locate header row (starts with "Local time in ...")
header_row <- which(grepl("^Local time", raw_dt[[1]]))[1]
if (is.na(header_row)) stop("Could not find header row in weather file.")

col_names <- as.character(unlist(raw_dt[header_row]))
dt <- raw_dt[(header_row + 1):.N]
setnames(dt, col_names)

# Drop completely empty columns
dt <- dt[, which(!is.na(names(dt)) & trimws(names(dt)) != ""), with = FALSE]

# Rename key columns for easier handling
old_time_col <- names(dt)[1]
setnames(dt, old_time_col, "local_time")

# Parse datetime (format like "21.01.2026 22:00")
dt[, local_time := as.POSIXct(local_time, format = "%d.%m.%Y %H:%M", tz = "America/New_York")]
dt <- dt[!is.na(local_time)]

# Helper: coerce to numeric safely
num_clean <- function(x) {
  x <- gsub(",", ".", as.character(x))
  x <- gsub("[^0-9\\.-]", "", x)
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

# Core inputs for DI
if ("T" %in% names(dt)) dt[, T := num_clean(T)] else stop("Missing T (air temp).")
if ("U" %in% names(dt)) dt[, U := num_clean(U)] else stop("Missing U (relative humidity).")
if ("Ff" %in% names(dt)) dt[, Ff := num_clean(Ff)] else dt[, Ff := NA_real_]

# Compute DI per observation (Appendix A)
RH <- dt$U
T <- dt$T
V <- dt$Ff

e <- (RH / 100) * 6.105 * exp((17.2 * T) / (237.7 + T))
AT <- 1.07 * T + 0.2 * e - 0.65 * V - 2.7

a <- 0.151977
b <- 8.313659
c <- 1.676311
d <- 0.00391838
ecoef <- 0.023101
f <- 4.68035

Tw <- AT * atan(a * RH + b) + atan(AT + RH) - atan(RH - c) + d * RH^2 * atan(ecoef * RH) - f
DI <- 0.5 * Tw + 0.5 * AT

dt[, `:=`(AT = AT, Tw = Tw, DI = DI)]

# Aggregate to daily features (compatible with daily crime data)
dt[, date := as.IDate(local_time)]
daily <- dt[, .(
  t_mean = mean(T, na.rm = TRUE),
  t_min = min(T, na.rm = TRUE),
  t_max = max(T, na.rm = TRUE),
  rh_mean = mean(U, na.rm = TRUE),
  wind_mean = mean(Ff, na.rm = TRUE),
  at_mean = mean(AT, na.rm = TRUE),
  tw_mean = mean(Tw, na.rm = TRUE),
  di_mean = mean(DI, na.rm = TRUE),
  obs_count = .N
), by = date]

# Filter to target date range
daily <- daily[date >= min_date & date <= max_date]

# Write cleaned dataset
fwrite(daily, output_path)
```
